WARNING: CS holds this. Maps each eval-site E-code back to the R-code. WITHHELD from the operator until the operator's evaluation is submitted. Unblinding to arm ALSO needs Key-1 (operator-held R-code->arm). Neither key alone reveals arm.
unblinding: Final unblind = compose Key-1 (operator: Rcode->arm) o this Key-2 (Ecode->Rcode) -> Ecode->arm. Produces blinding_key_FULL.json. Only then does the 3-arm analysis compute the L8-L7 / L8-B / L7-B deltas.
